data.title: Cantargia Showcases New Nadunolimab Trial in Hard-to-Treat Colorectal Cancer at AACR 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cantargia AB ( (SE:CANTA) ) has issued an update.

Cantargia will present the design and supporting preclinical data for an investigator-initiated phase 1b/2 trial of its IL1RAP-targeting antibody nadunolimab combined with the anti-PD-1 drug toripalimab in chemotherapy-refractory metastatic microsatellite stable colorectal cancer at the AACR 2026 meeting. The Mount Sinai–led study, which has enrolled two of a planned 21 patients, is backed by data showing a nadunolimab surrogate reduces tumor burden, reverses immunosuppression and expands cytotoxic T cells in a colorectal cancer model otherwise resistant to immunotherapy, potentially broadening nadunolimab’s role beyond its current focus in pancreatic and lung cancer and reinforcing Cantargia’s positioning in difficult-to-treat solid tumors.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:CANTA) stock is a Buy with a SEK14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cantargia AB stock, see the SE:CANTA Stock Forecast page.

More about Cantargia AB

Cantargia AB is a Swedish biotechnology company developing antibody-based treatments for life-threatening diseases, built around the IL1RAP protein implicated in several cancers and inflammatory conditions. Its lead oncology antibody, nadunolimab (CAN04), is being clinically evaluated mainly in combination with chemotherapy for pancreatic cancer and non-small cell lung cancer, while a second program, CAN10 for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, was acquired by Otsuka Pharmaceutical in 2025.

Average Trading Volume: 2,235,369

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK1.03B

Learn more about CANTA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zentalis Highlights New Azenosertib Data in Breast Cancer
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Zentalis Pharmaceuticals ( (ZNTL) ) has provided an update.

On April 17, 2026, at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting in San Diego, Zentalis Pharmaceuticals reported new preclinical data for its WEE1 inhibitor azenosertib in triple-negative breast cancer. The studies showed that azenosertib, alone and in combinations with antibody-drug conjugates and chemotherapy, induced deep tumor responses and restored drug sensitivity in models resistant to established and emerging ADC therapies, pointing to potential use beyond ovarian cancer.

In parallel, the company shared real-world analyses from two independent cohorts showing that Cyclin E1-positive ovarian cancer patients, regardless of CCNE1 gene amplification, experienced shorter time to next treatment and poorer outcomes with standard care. These findings underscore a high unmet need in this large patient subset and provide clinical context for Zentalis’s late-stage azenosertib programs, which target Cyclin E1-positive platinum-resistant ovarian cancer and aim to establish the drug as a pivotal, biomarker-driven therapy in gynecologic oncology.

The most recent analyst rating on (ZNTL) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zentalis Pharmaceuticals stock, see the ZNTL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ZNTL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZNTL is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing losses, inconsistent revenue, and sustained cash burn) despite manageable leverage. Strong technical uptrend and a positive clinical development event provide support, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on ZNTL stock, click here.

More about Zentalis Pharmaceuticals

Zentalis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage oncology company focused on developing targeted treatments for ovarian cancer and multiple tumor types. The company is advancing late-stage studies of azenosertib, an investigational, orally available, first-in-class WEE1 inhibitor, as both monotherapy and in combination regimens, with a biomarker-driven strategy centered on Cyclin E1-positive tumors and a goal of providing non-chemotherapy options.

Azenosertib is being developed primarily for Cyclin E1-positive platinum-resistant ovarian cancer, a biomarker-defined population that represents roughly half of PROC cases and currently lacks approved targeted therapies. The drug has received Fast Track designation from the U.S. FDA for this indication, and Zentalis is validating a Cyclin E1 companion diagnostic in its DENALI and ASPENOVA clinical trials to better identify patients most likely to benefit.

Average Trading Volume: 1,815,359

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $380.2M

Find detailed analytics on ZNTL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Boeing Shareholders Back Board, Pay, and Governance Status Quo
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Boeing ( (BA) ) is now available.

At its April 17, 2026 annual meeting, Boeing shareholders elected the full slate of director nominees with comfortable margins, signaling continued investor support for the current board and governance structure. Shareholders also approved on an advisory basis the compensation of named executive officers and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the company’s independent auditor for 2026, reinforcing continuity in executive pay practices and financial oversight.

Two shareholder proposals aimed at governance and accessibility changes failed to gain traction, with investors decisively rejecting a call for a board committee on disability access and a measure to allow action by written consent. The voting outcomes collectively indicate that investors are largely aligned with management on oversight, compensation, and governance mechanics, limiting near‑term pressure for structural changes at the aerospace group.

The most recent analyst rating on (BA) stock is a Buy with a $285.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boeing stock, see the BA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak underlying financial quality (high leverage and volatile/negative free cash flow) and a demanding valuation (high P/E). Offsetting factors include strong technical momentum and an earnings-call-supported operational recovery plan with improving deliveries and backlog, though execution and certification/program risks remain significant.

To see Spark’s full report on BA stock, click here.

More about Boeing

Boeing is a leading global aerospace and defense manufacturer that designs, produces, and services commercial airplanes, defense and space systems, and related technologies. The company serves airlines, governments, and space agencies worldwide, playing a central role in commercial aviation, military aircraft, and satellite markets.

data.title: LLB Shareholders Back All AGM Proposals as Bank Delivers Stable Profits and Record Volumes
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Liechtensteinische Landesbank AG ( (CH:LLBN) ) is now available.

Shareholders of Liechtensteinische Landesbank AG approved all motions at the 34th ordinary Annual General Meeting, including the 2025 financial statements, re-election of auditor KPMG and the confirmation of Board members Nicole Brunhart and Christian Wiesendanger. The dividend was kept stable at CHF 2.80 per share, implying a 3.3% yield and delivering substantial distributions to both private and institutional investors as well as the Principality of Liechtenstein as main shareholder.

LLB reported a resilient 2025 performance in a challenging environment, with Group net profit virtually unchanged at CHF 166.5 million and business volume reaching a record CHF 125.9 billion, supported by CHF 3.7 billion in net new money and higher net new loans. With a strong Tier 1 ratio of 19.0% and an Aa2 deposit rating underpinning its stability, the bank plans to shift strategic emphasis toward efficiency in 2026 as it concludes its current ACT-26 strategy and prepares a successor plan to be presented in the autumn.

More about Liechtensteinische Landesbank AG

Liechtensteinische Landesbank AG is the most traditional financial institution in the Principality of Liechtenstein and operates as a universal bank with a focus on wealth management, private banking, asset management and fund services. Majority-owned by the Principality and listed on SIX under the symbol LLBN, the LLB Group employs 1,523 staff and serves clients from bases in Liechtenstein, Switzerland, Austria, Germany and the United Arab Emirates, managing a business volume of CHF 125.9 billion as of end-2025.

Average Trading Volume: 30,192

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: CHF3.02B

Cloudia Research S.p.A. ( (IT:AGAIN) ) has shared an announcement.

Cloudia Research S.p.A., listed on Euronext Growth Milan, has updated its 2026 corporate events calendar, shifting the Board of Directors meeting to approve the 2025 separate financial statements and present the consolidated accounts to 29 April 2026. For investors, this means the Shareholders’ Meeting to approve the 2025 separate financial statements is now set for 29 May 2026, while the Board meeting to approve the half-year report as of 30 June 2026 remains scheduled for 25 September 2026, providing clearer visibility on the company’s forthcoming financial disclosure timetable.

data.title: Erste Group Clears Share Buyback Framework for Austrian Savings Banks
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Erste Group Bank ( (EBKOF) ) has issued an update.

Erste Group Bank has approved a framework programme allowing Austrian savings banks within its credit institution group to buy up to 812,974 Erste Group shares, representing about 0.19% of share capital. The purchases, spanning from 27 April 2026 to 17 November 2028, will involve ordinary no-par value bearer shares and may be executed both on and off the stock exchange.

The share buyback framework sets a price floor of EUR 2 per share and a cap at 50% above the 20-day volume-weighted average price, with no impact expected on Erste’s stock exchange listing. By enabling affiliated Austrian savings banks to acquire additional Erste shares classified as own shares, the group is fine-tuning its internal ownership structure without altering existing trading authorisations or introducing employee share option programmes.

The most recent analyst rating on (EBKOF) stock is a Buy with a EUR117.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Erste Group Bank stock, see the EBKOF Stock Forecast page.

More about Erste Group Bank

Erste Group Bank AG is a leading Central and Eastern European banking group headquartered in Vienna, Austria. It provides retail and corporate banking, asset management and capital markets services, and its shares are listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange as well as on the Bucharest and Prague exchanges.

Average Trading Volume: 407,221

Current Market Cap: €42.52B

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Airbus SE ( (EADSY) ) has issued an update.

Airbus shareholders approved all resolutions at the 2026 Annual General Meeting in Amsterdam, including board mandate renewals, the appointment of new non-executive directors Henriette Hallberg Thygesen and BMW’s Oliver Zipse, and a 2025 dividend of €3.20 per share. The company highlighted its strong position after a landmark 2025, underpinned by a staggered board reappointment process designed to safeguard continuity and expertise.

The board announced that long-serving Chair René Obermann will leave the board at the 2027 AGM and step down as chair on 1 October 2026, with Lead Independent Director Amparo Moraleda designated as his successor to ensure a smooth transition. This planned leadership change, following a period of crises such as the pandemic and supply chain disruptions, signals a managed succession aimed at preserving strategic stability as Airbus navigates evolving geopolitical and industrial challenges.

The most recent analyst rating on (EADSY) stock is a Buy with a $240.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Airbus SE stock, see the EADSY Stock Forecast page.

More about Airbus SE

Airbus SE is a leading European aerospace and defence group that designs and manufactures commercial aircraft, helicopters, military transport and combat aircraft, as well as space systems. The company serves airlines, governments and institutional customers worldwide, and has emerged as a key player in civil aviation while reshaping its Defence and Space activities to strengthen its global market position.

data.title: Banco di Desio Nears Full Takeover of Solutions Capital Management with High Tender Uptake
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Banco di Desio e Della Brianza SPA ( (IT:BDB) ) has shared an announcement.

Banco di Desio e della Brianza S.p.A. has launched a voluntary total public tender offer for all ordinary shares of Solutions Capital Management SIM S.p.A., an Italian financial services firm. The offer targets up to 2,234,264 shares, representing the entire share capital of SCM at the date of the offer document.

As of the third week of the tender period, which runs from 30 March to 24 April 2026, a total of 1,907,402 SCM shares have been tendered, equal to 85.37% of the shares subject to the offer. This includes the contribution of 1,793,680 shares, or 80.28% of the capital, from controlling shareholder Holding Partecipazioni Societarie S.r.l., signaling strong support for the transaction.

During the third week alone, from 13 to 17 April 2026, 34,550 shares were tendered, showing continued but moderating participation as the deadline approaches. The consideration remains set at EUR 4.61 per share on a cum-dividend basis, and investors have until 24 April 2026 to join the offer, barring any extension or reopening of the tender terms.

The high acceptance level indicates that Banco di Desio e della Brianza is on track to acquire effective control, and potentially full ownership, of SCM, reinforcing its role in the Italian investment and asset management sector. For SCM shareholders, the offer provides a liquidity event at a defined price, while for the bank it represents a strategic expansion of its product range and advisory capabilities.

More about Banco di Desio e Della Brianza SPA

Banco di Desio e della Brianza S.p.A. is an Italian banking group that provides retail and corporate banking services, including lending, savings products, and investment services. The bank operates primarily in Italy and uses strategic equity investments and acquisitions to strengthen its position in financial services and asset management.

Average Trading Volume: 92,110

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €1.23B

data.title: Kier Group Expands Share Buyback, Clarifies Voting Share Count
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kier Group plc ( (GB:KIE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kier Group plc has continued its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing 250,000 ordinary shares over the period from 13 to 17 April 2026 through Deutsche Numis, at volume-weighted average prices ranging from about 206p to 216p per share. The company intends to hold these shares in treasury, bringing total buybacks since the programme’s launch to 1,550,000 shares and leaving 440,346,922 voting shares in issue, a move that may support earnings per share and signals ongoing capital management to existing shareholders.

The updated share count and treasury position clarify the denominator for investors’ disclosure obligations under U.K. transparency rules, ensuring the market can accurately track significant holdings in Kier. By actively managing its capital structure through buybacks, Kier may enhance shareholder value and demonstrate confidence in its financial position, which could positively influence investor sentiment in the U.K. construction and infrastructure sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:KIE) stock is a Hold with a £215.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kier Group plc stock, see the GB:KIE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KIE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KIE is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (especially cash flow strength) and a constructive earnings update with strong order-book visibility and improving cash position. This is moderated by leverage risk, near-term remediation charges and seasonal cash volatility, and only neutral technical momentum with the stock slightly weak versus its 20-day average.

To see Spark’s full report on KIE stock, click here.

More about Kier Group plc

Kier Group plc is a U.K.-based construction and infrastructure services company, operating through divisions that deliver building, civil engineering and related services for public and private sector clients. The Group focuses on long-term framework contracts and regional projects, positioning itself as a key player in the U.K. infrastructure and construction markets.
